mapper.sql: p.symbol, p.name, p.issuer, p.category, p.strategy, p.region, p.asset_class AS assetClass, p.currency, p.benchmark, p.expense_ratio AS expenseRatio, p.dividend_yield AS dividendYield, p.aum_million AS aumMillion, p.holdings_count AS holdingsCount, p.inception_date AS inceptionDate, p.description, p.website, p.logo_url AS logoUrl, p.source, q.current_price AS currentPrice, q.previous_close AS previousClose, q.open_price AS openPrice, q.high_price AS highPrice, q.low_price AS lowPrice, q.volume, q.quote_time AS quoteTime, c.latest_trade_date AS latestTradeDate, COALESCE(c.candle_count, 0) AS candleCount
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM etf_profile p LEFT JOIN etf_quote_cache q ON q.symbol = p.symbol LEFT JOIN ( SELECT symbol, MAX(trade_date) AS latest_trade_date, COUNT(*) AS candle_count FROM etf_candle_daily GROUP BY symbol ) c ON c.symbol = p.symbol WHERE p.active = TRUE ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.symbol ASC

SELECT
FROM etf_profile p LEFT JOIN etf_quote_cache q ON q.symbol = p.symbol LEFT JOIN ( SELECT symbol, MAX(trade_date) AS latest_trade_date, COUNT(*) AS candle_count FROM etf_candle_daily GROUP BY symbol ) c ON c.symbol = p.symbol WHERE p.symbol = #{symbol} AND p.active = TRUE
SELECT symbol FROM etf_profile WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, symbol ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT symbol, trade_date AS tradeDate, open_price AS openPrice, high_price AS highPrice, low_price AS lowPrice, close_price AS closePrice, volume, source, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM etf_candle_daily WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO etf_quote_cache ( symbol, current_price, open_price, high_price, low_price, previous_close, volume, quote_time, source ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{currentPrice}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{previousClose}, #{volume}, #{quoteTime}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_price = VALUES(current_price), open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), previous_close = VALUES(previous_close), volume = VALUES(volume), quote_time = VALUES(quote_time), source = VALUES(source), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO etf_candle_daily ( symbol, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, source ) VALUES
( #{item.symbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume}, #{item.source} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), close_price = VALUES(close_price), volume = VALUES(volume), source = VALUES(source), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
